doc: Pure-TS port of GMP mpn_zero: produce an n-limb all-zeros array. Substrate-class -- operates on raw bigint arrays, not src/core.ts MPFR values; runner sets requireCoreImport=false for substrate. In C, mpn_zero zeros the n limbs of rp in place; in the immutable TS substrate we return a fresh n-element array of 0n.
refs: GMP manual §8.3 (Low-level Functions): zero-fill an n-limb array.
mpfr/src/mpfr-mini-gmp.c L199, L206, L237, L239, L265, L269 -- mpn_zero call sites inside mpn_divrem_1 / mpn_tdiv_qr.
